key_findings.finding: L-025 cascade amplification of falsified framing
key_findings.detail: L-025 edge-of-chaos claim falsified by L-613/L-618 (S357). 17 lessons cite L-025, 0/17 also cite correction. Falsified framing propagated uncorrected.
Dense citation web among L-025/026/029/035/039/042/044/055/097. Natural topical clustering, not circular authority. All Verified confidence. But cluster amplifies L-025 falsified framing.
L-469 (T4 absorber anti-cascade) has n=1 structural snapshot with 5+ citations. Single observation amplified by citation network.
n=1 inflation detector initially missed findings because it only checked Measured/Assumed confidence tags. Real n=1 lessons use Observed/Structural tags. Fixed during session.

n1_inflation.coverage: PARTIAL — detector catches explicit n=1 only, not implied small samples

citation_loop.coverage: FULL — all mutual A<->B cycles found

cascade_amplification.coverage: FULL — all lessons with >=5 cites + >=2 amplifying citers

iso_false_positive.coverage: FULL — no ISO-tagged lessons with weak evidence are highly cited (good)

recency_override.coverage: PARTIAL — requires title overlap + Sharpe inversion (may miss semantic supersession)

recommendations: PRIORITY 1: Add falsification correction notes to 17 lessons citing L-025
PRIORITY 2: Build correction-propagation mechanism — when lesson is falsified, auto-flag citers
PRIORITY 3: Expand n=1 detector to catch implied small samples without explicit (n=N) tags
PRIORITY 4: Add semantic similarity to recency override detector (not just title overlap)
